metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace name into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: EntraOps Privileged EAM Parser for WatchLists
properties.Query:
_GetWatchlist('EntraOps_Principals')
| extend ObjectId = tostring(ObjectId)
| extend ObjectTenantId = tostring(ObjectTenantId)
| join kind=inner (
    _GetWatchlist('EntraOps_RoleAssignments')
        | extend ObjectId = tostring(ObjectId)
        | extend RoleAssignmentId = tostring(RoleAssignmentId)
        | extend RoleAssignmentScopeId = tostring(RoleAssignmentScopeId)
        | extend RoleDefinitionId = tostring(RoleDefinitionId)
        | extend EligibilityBy = case(
            RoleSystem == "EntraID"
                and PIMAssignmentType == "Eligible"
                and RoleAssignmentSubType in ("Nested Eligible member", "Eligible member"),
                "PIM for Entra ID Roles and Groups",
            RoleSystem == "EntraID"
                and PIMAssignmentType == "Eligible",
                "PIM for Entra ID Roles",
            RoleAssignmentSubType in ("Nested Eligible group member", "Eligible member"),
                "PIM for Groups",
            "N/A"
        )
        | extend TransitiveByPim = iff(RoleAssignmentSubType == "Nested Eligible member" or RoleAssignmentSubType == "Eligible member", true, false)
        | join kind=inner (
            _GetWatchlist('EntraOps_RoleClassifications')
            | project RoleAssignmentId, RoleAssignmentScopeId, RoleSystem, RoleDefinitionId,
                      AdminTierLevel, AdminTierLevelName, Service, TaggedBy,
                      TaggedByObjectIds, TaggedByObjectDisplayNames, TaggedByRoleSystem
            | extend AdminTierLevelInt = toint(AdminTierLevel)
            | extend RoleAssignmentId = tostring(RoleAssignmentId)
            | extend RoleAssignmentScopeId = tostring(RoleAssignmentScopeId)
            | extend RoleDefinitionId = tostring(RoleDefinitionId)
            | extend Classification = bag_pack_columns(
                AdminTierLevel,
                AdminTierLevelName,
                Service,
                TaggedBy,
                TaggedByObjectIds,
                TaggedByObjectDisplayNames,
                TaggedByRoleSystem
            )
            | summarize Classification = make_list(Classification) by RoleAssignmentId, RoleAssignmentScopeId, RoleSystem, RoleDefinitionId
        ) on RoleAssignmentId, RoleAssignmentScopeId, RoleSystem, RoleDefinitionId
        | extend RoleAssignment = bag_pack_columns(
            ObjectId,
            ObjectType,
            EligibilityBy,
            PIMAssignmentType,
            PIMManagedRole,
            RoleAssignmentId,
            RoleAssignmentScopeId,
            RoleAssignmentScopeName,
            RoleAssignmentType,
            RoleAssignmentSubType,
            RoleDefinitionId,
            RoleDefinitionName,
            RoleType,
            RoleIsPrivileged,
            Classification,
            TransitiveByPim,
            TransitiveByObjectDisplayName,
            TransitiveByObjectId,
            TransitiveByNestingObjectDisplayNames,
            TransitiveByNestingObjectIds
        )
        | summarize RoleAssignments = make_list(RoleAssignment) by ObjectId, RoleSystem
    ) on ObjectId, RoleSystem
| extend Type = "EntraOps_WatchLists"
| project
    TimeGenerated = LastUpdatedTimeUTC,
    ObjectId,
    ObjectTenantId,
    ObjectType,
    ObjectSubType,
    ObjectDisplayName,
    ObjectUserPrincipalName,
    ObjectAdminTierLevel,
    ObjectAdminTierLevelName,
    OnPremSynchronized,
    AssignedAdministrativeUnits,
    RestrictedManagementByRAG,
    RestrictedManagementByAadRole,
    RestrictedManagementByRMAU,
    RoleSystem,
    Classification,
    RoleAssignments,
    Owners,
    Sponsors,
    OwnedObjects,
    OwnedDevices,
    IdentityParent,
    AssociatedWorkAccount,
    AssociatedPawDevice,
    Type
| sort by ObjectDisplayName asc, RoleSystem asc, ObjectType asc, ObjectSubType asc
